Title: Updating Verification Information
Content:
Your verification request may be rejected due to missing information, invalid documents, etc. You will receive an Account Holder webhook notification that will give you specific information to update the Account Holder accordingly. To update your merchant’s information, you must update the Account Holder object with the parameters that need to be revised.

Sample callback payload:

{
    "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
    "event": "account_holder.kyc.status",
    "business_id": "5fe2b0137b7d62542fe6d7de",
    "data": {
        "id": "57fb4e076fa3fa296b7f5a97",
        "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
        "updated": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
        "kyc": {
            "status": "RESUBMISSION_REQUIRED",
            "verified_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
            "requested_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
            "failure_reasons": [
                {
                    "field": "website_url",
                    "message": "Website is Invalid"
                }
            ]
        }
    }
}

Sample requests

PATCH https://api.xendit.co/account_holders/{id}

Update website URL

{
    "website_url": "sample-marketplace.xendit.com"
}

Update KYC documents

{
    "kyc_documents": [
        {
            "country": "PH",
            "type": "LATEST_GIS_DOCUMENT",
            "file_id": "63f8719642f5856dc9feje7"
        }
    ]
}

Title: Memperbarui informasi verifikasi
Content:
Permintaan verifikasi Anda dapat ditolak karena informasi yang hilang, dokumen tidak valid, dll. Anda akan menerima pemberitahuan webhook Account Holder yang akan memberi Anda informasi spesifik untuk memperbarui detail Account Holder. Untuk memperbarui informasi merchant, Anda harus memperbarui objek Account Holder dengan parameter yang perlu direvisi.

Contoh callback payload:

{
    "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
    "event": "account_holder.kyc.status",
    "business_id": "5fe2b0137b7d62542fe6d7de",
    "data": {
        "id": "57fb4e076fa3fa296b7f5a97",
        "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
        "updated": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
        "kyc": {
            "status": "RESUBMISSION_REQUIRED",
            "verified_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
            "requested_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
            "failure_reasons": [
                {
                    "field": "website_url",
                    "message": "Website is Invalid"
                }
            ]
        }
    }
}

Conoth rquest

PATCH https://api.xendit.co/account_holders/{id}

Perbarui URL situs web

{
    "website_url": "sample-marketplace.xendit.com"
}

Perbarui dokumen KYC

{
    "kyc_documents": [
        {
            "country": "PH",
            "type": "LATEST_GIS_DOCUMENT",
            "file_id": "63f8719642f5856dc9feje7"
        }
    ]
}

Title: การอัปเดตข้อมูลการยืนยัน
Content:
คำขอการยืนยันของคุณอาจถูกปฏิเสธเนื่องจากข้อมูลไม่ครบถ้วน เอกสารไม่ถูกต้อง หรือเหตุผลอื่น ๆ คุณจะได้รับการแจ้งเตือน Account Holder webhook ซึ่งจะให้ข้อมูลเฉพาะที่คุณต้องใช้ในการอัปเดต Account Holder หากต้องการอัปเดตข้อมูลร้านค้าของคุณ คุณต้องอัปเดตออบเจกต์ Account Holder ด้วยพารามิเตอร์ที่ต้องแก้ไข

เพย์โหลด callback ตัวอย่าง:

{
    "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
    "event": "account_holder.kyc.status",
    "business_id": "5fe2b0137b7d62542fe6d7de",
    "data": {
        "id": "57fb4e076fa3fa296b7f5a97",
        "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
        "updated": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
        "kyc": {
            "status": "RESUBMISSION_REQUIRED",
            "verified_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
            "requested_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
            "failure_reasons": [
                {
                    "field": "website_url",
                    "message": "Website is Invalid"
                }
            ]
        }
    }
}

คำขอตัวอย่าง

PATCH https://api.xendit.co/account_holders/{id}

อัปเดต website URL

{
    "website_url": "sample-marketplace.xendit.com"
}

อัปเดตเอกสาร KYC

{
    "kyc_documents": [
        {
            "country": "PH",
            "type": "LATEST_GIS_DOCUMENT",
            "file_id": "63f8719642f5856dc9feje7"
        }
    ]
}
SeoTitle: การอัปเดตข้อมูลการยืนยัน

Title: Actualización de Información de Verificación
Content:
Su solicitud de verificación puede ser rechazada debido a información faltante, documentos inválidos, etc. Usted recibirá una notificación webhook de Account Holder que le proporcionará información específica para actualizar el Account Holder de manera adecuada. Para actualizar la información de su comercio (merchant), usted debe actualizar el Account Holder object con los parámetros que necesitan ser revisados.

Carga útil (payload) de callback de ejemplo:

{
    "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
    "event": "account_holder.kyc.status",
    "business_id": "5fe2b0137b7d62542fe6d7de",
    "data": {
        "id": "57fb4e076fa3fa296b7f5a97",
        "created": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
        "updated": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
        "kyc": {
            "status": "RESUBMISSION_REQUIRED",
            "verified_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
            "requested_at": "2021-01-01T10:00:00Z",
            "failure_reasons": [
                {
                    "field": "website_url",
                    "message": "Website is Invalid"
                }
            ]
        }
    }
}

Solicitudes de ejemplo

PATCH https://api.xendit.co/account_holders/{id}

Actualizar URL del sitio web

{
    "website_url": "sample-marketplace.xendit.com"
}

Actualizar documentos KYC

{
    "kyc_documents": [
        {
            "country": "PH",
            "type": "LATEST_GIS_DOCUMENT",
            "file_id": "63f8719642f5856dc9feje7"
        }
    ]
}
